top_signals.title: Iran War Fuels Interest in Renewables, Multilateral Lender Says
top_signals.summary: The conflict in Iran, which has sent crude prices to multi-year highs, is fueling interest in renewables and projects aimed at boosting energy security, according to the Private Infrastructure Development Group.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Morgan Stanley files amendments for ETH and SOL ETFs, revealing lowest fees in market
top_signals.summary: The disclosure of additional amendments typically reflects active communication with the SEC and progress in the launch process.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Paris Saint-Germain’s Champions League final shirts smash records in auction
top_signals.summary: Paris Saint-Germain have another title to add to their collection after successfully defending the Champions League: the undisputed hottest property for collectors of match worn shirts and other sports memorabilia. Some of the signed PSG jerseys worn by star players in their Champions League final win over Arsenal last month went under the hammer on [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Japan to allow local governments to ban private lodging
top_signals.summary: The move comes amid complaints of lodgers partying at night, ignoring trash rules, and leaving cigarette butts on the streets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: OpenAI to introduce ads to ChatGPT in Japan
top_signals.summary: The ads will appear on the free version and the Go plan, priced at ¥1,400 per month, but will not be shown to users under 18 or who subscribe to higher-priced tiers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
